blockers.direct_cause: No real operator-supplied rights evidence exists; no real publishable asset exists to attach rights to
blockers.auto_resolves_with_rights_approved_image: partial -- also needs a code change to stop hardcoding technical_fixture classification
blockers.notes: No intake mechanism currently wired for a human to supply real rights evidence at all -- unbuilt capability, not a defect.

blockers.direct_cause: No real evidence records exist because no real asset exists to attest
blockers.auto_resolves_with_rights_approved_image: partial -- same intake-wiring gap as PUBLISH_RIGHTS_BLOCKED

blockers.direct_cause: content_type 'community' requires a real captured source-post image; none has been sourced, render used solid-color background instead
blockers.auto_resolves_with_rights_approved_image: yes -- most direct single-cause blocker of the six; supplying a real post_capture image should clear this without a code change

blockers.input_condition: release_guard.ready=false, folding in technical_fixture classification + commercial_relationship_unreviewed + operator_attestation_invalid + operator_checklist_incomplete + final_cards_invalid(x4) + publishable_asset_missing
blockers.direct_cause: Aggregate of missing rights/evidence/operator-review input AND the independent final_cards_invalid defect (see PUBLISH_MANIFEST_PATH_MISMATCH)
blockers.auto_resolves_with_rights_approved_image: no -- requires both real user input AND the PUBLISH_MANIFEST_PATH_MISMATCH defect fixed
blockers.notes: Mixed cause: part expected-input gap, part independent defect inherited via final_cards_invalid.

blockers.input_condition: attestation.cards == [] because CardNewsPublishGate._check_final_cards rejected all 4 cards on Path(path).is_absolute()
blockers.direct_cause: card_dir is reassigned to an absolute .runs-scoped Path (CardNewsOutputSetTransaction.root is .resolve()d), so CardNewsModule writes absolute card_path strings; _build_pre_publish_attestation is called BEFORE transaction.stage() rewrites paths to canonical repo-relative form, so the attestation permanently bakes in an empty cards list
blockers.actual_path_compared_against: [] (empty list inside the embedded pre_publish_attestation.cards, due to absolute-path rejection at attestation-build time, confirmed by 4x final_cards_invalid entries at card_index 0-3)
blockers.owning_function_for_fix: _build_pre_publish_attestation (and/or its call sequencing in _run_card_news_output_transaction relative to transaction.stage())
blockers.minimum_test_if_fixed: Assert _build_pre_publish_attestation's resulting attestation.cards is non-empty and repo-relative when given .runs-scoped absolute card paths, matching this reproduction exactly.
blockers.notes: Would continue to block a fully rights-approved future submission until fixed -- confirmed independent of rights/evidence/compliance approval status.

blockers.input_condition: any(readiness_checks[key] is not True for key in 11 required_readiness_checks)
blockers.direct_cause: Pure aggregate flag -- adds no new information beyond 'one or more of the 11 sub-checks is false'
blockers.auto_resolves_with_rights_approved_image: no -- requires all 5 failing constituent checks to clear, including the independent PUBLISH_MANIFEST_PATH_MISMATCH defect

image_strategy_real_source_assessment.rights_verified: not_applicable -- no real asset exists to verify rights for
image_strategy_real_source_assessment.relationship_to_fallback_png: the rendered card PNGs are solid-color background fallbacks substituted because no real post_capture image was sourced (confirmed via image_sourcing_status.checklist and real_image_used_count=0)
image_strategy_real_source_assessment.promoted_to_publish_asset_evidence: render_allowed=false and classification='technical_fixture_not_publish_approved' for all 4 assets in pre_publish_attestation; actual_publish=false throughout
